fun solve(code: Array<String>, businessLine: Array<String>, isActive: Array<Boolean>): Array<String> {
    val validBusinessLines = setOf("electronics", "grocery", "pharmacy", "restaurant")
    val businessOrder = listOf("electronics", "grocery", "pharmacy", "restaurant")
    val businessMap = businessOrder.mapIndexed { index, line -> line to index }.toMap()

    val validCoupons = mutableListOf<Pair<String, String>>()

    for (i in code.indices) {
        val c = code[i]
        val bl = businessLine[i]
        val active = isActive[i]

        if (c.isEmpty()) continue
        if (!c.matches(Regex("^\\w+$"))) continue
        if (bl !in validBusinessLines) continue
        if (!active) continue

        validCoupons.add(Pair(bl, c))
    }

    validCoupons.sortWith(compareBy<Pair<String, String>> { pair ->
        businessMap[pair.first] to pair.second
    })

    return validCoupons.map { it.second }.toTypedArray()
}
```
